topIngredients.name: Retinol 1%
topIngredients.benefit: High-concentration pure retinol for maximum anti-aging efficacy

topIngredients.name: Squalane
topIngredients.benefit: Plant-derived oil that cushions skin against retinol irritation

topIngredients.name: Tocopherol (Vitamin E)
topIngredients.benefit: Antioxidant that protects the retinol formula and nourishes skin

verdict: The Ordinary Retinol 1% in Squalane is the highest-concentration budget retinol available. The squalane base significantly reduces irritation risk while maintaining efficacy. Not for beginners — start with a lower concentration.
